what_it_does: This noticeboard item records that the expected Obsidian vault configuration directory `~/company/.obsidian/` is missing, explains the resulting gap between convention and actual repository state, and proposes creating `.obsidian/` as a low-risk reuse step.
observations: Frontmatter identifies this as a `block` typed noticeboard item with id `item-e2dd1772` sourced from `claude_code` in the `dragnet-development` channel
The body states that `~/company/.obsidian/` does not exist even though the convention says to open `~/company` as an Obsidian vault and references a tracked `.obsidian/`
It describes the repo as a vault by markdown convention but not yet actually opened/configured in Obsidian
It proposes instantiating `.obsidian/` with graph config, properties, and Bases
standouts: The core signal is the explicit mismatch between a documented `.obsidian/` convention and its absence on disk
It reframes creating IDE configuration as a concrete, low-risk reuse task
It is linked as a child/part of another noticeboard item
conventions: Follows the noticeboard item schema with YAML frontmatter, `board://` address, `id`, `type`, `source`, `channel`, and `links`
Uses a `part_of` relation to connect to a parent item
References the convention of opening `~/company` as an Obsidian vault and tracking shared `.obsidian/` settings
Breaks/violates the same convention it documents by noting the missing `.obsidian/` directory
concerns: The claim that the repo has 'never actually been opened/configured in Obsidian' is an inference not directly verifiable from this file alone
No timestamped evidence or filesystem listing is included to prove current absence
The `P4` prefix in the title is unexplained
If `.obsidian/` is later created, this item could become stale without an update
notes: A short gap note flagging the missing Obsidian vault config and asking for `.obsidian/` to be instantiated.
questions: What does the `P4` prefix in the title signify?
What exact files and settings belong in the proposed `.obsidian/` (graph config, properties, Bases)?
Who is responsible for creating and committing `.obsidian/`?
What is the content and status of the parent item `item-861627e3`?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose and actual content match: it documents a concrete gap and the next step to close it.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to turn a latent setup problem into an explicit, actionable work item so the repository can be used as a properly configured Obsidian vault.
novelty: It treats the absence of a dot-directory as a first-class asset gap in a noticeboard ledger and frames creating IDE configuration as a reuse step.
contribution: Records a concrete, actionable gap between documented convention and filesystem state, and proposes a low-risk instantiation step for shared Obsidian settings.
summary_for_embedding: Noticeboard item item-e2dd1772 records that the company repository's expected Obsidian vault configuration directory `.obsidian/` is missing and proposes creating it to align the repo with its markdown-vault convention.
intention_for_embedding: To surface and resolve the absence of shared Obsidian settings so the repository can be used as a configured vault.
